description: Local media helper service for webOS playback

services.name: space.nuvio.webos.service
services.description: Boots the local media runtime and exposes health checks

commands.name: ping
commands.description: Boot the local runtime and report service health

commands.name: status
commands.description: Report the local HTTP endpoint status

commands.name: tracks
commands.description: Resolve embedded track metadata for a media URL

commands.name: torrentCreate
commands.description: Create an EngineFS torrent stream on the local media runtime

commands.name: torrentStats
commands.description: Read EngineFS torrent stream stats from the local media runtime

commands.name: torrentRemove
commands.description: Remove an EngineFS torrent stream from the local media runtime

commands.name: enginefsDiagnostic
commands.description: Run an EngineFS torrent diagnostic against the local media runtime

commands.name: enginefsKeepAlive
commands.description: Keep the local EngineFS runtime active while playback is using it

commands.name: enginefsKeepAliveStop
commands.description: Stop an active EngineFS runtime keep-alive subscription
